name: wifi-analyzer
description: WiFi Analyzer - Advanced local WiFi diagnostics for Android

scripts.prepare:web: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),path=require('path'); fs.copyFileSync('index.html','www/index.html'); ['css','js'].forEach(d=>{ if(!fs.existsSync('www/'+d)) fs.mkdirSync('www/'+d,{recursive:true}); fs.readdirSync(d).forEach(f=>fs.copyFileSync(path.join(d,f),path.join('www',d,f))); }); console.log('web assets prepared');"

author: iiZerve
